name: agent-playback
description: Turn long-running agent traces into personalized local audio briefings.

interface.shortDescription: Play back what your coding agent did.
interface.longDescription: Agent Playback creates a personalized, lively local audio recap from a long-running agent trace, coding session, or conversation log. It is built for users who want a NotebookLM-style spoken briefing instead of rereading a long chat.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create an Agent Playback audio briefing for this agent trace.
